prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年东南大学在海南省综合类最低录取位次分别为约986名→671名→569名→440名→397名，呈持续上升趋势（位次数字逐年减小），近5年累计前移约589名 ，年均前移约147名；2025年基准位次约397名，为历史最高水平；该校在海南省综合类招生计划：2021–2023年均为36人，2024–2025年增至38人，2026年进一步扩至41人，较2025年增加3人，扩招幅度约7.9%，有利于降低竞争烈度。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东南大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年 位列第15名（Top20），近年排名稳定在13–17名区间，学校层次极高，对高分考生吸引力持续强劲；近年声誉整体平稳，2023年曾出现师德师风相关负面舆情但 影响有限；抖音热度总排名第31位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上，未见明显报考热度异常信号；投档异常记录中未出现东南大学相关断档事件；拥有18个A- 及以上学科，其中建筑学、土木工程、交通运输工程、生物医学工程、电子科学与技术获评A+；计算机科学与技术、信息与通信工程、控制科学与工程等获评A/A-，学科实力雄厚 ，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信等东南大学核心招生专业在2026年专业热度分析中持续高热推荐；海南省2026年高考考生总数约78000 人，较2025年67408人增加约10592人（+15.7%），竞争基数显著扩大；东南大学位于江苏省南京市，非海南省本地高校，无本地 保护性招生倾斜；该校在海南招生占比约0.7%–0.8%，属全国各省中较低水平，地域偏好对报考影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年扩招3人（宽松效应约+19位次）与海南省 考生总数大幅增加约15.7%（收紧效应）、学校高层次的持续吸引力、核心专业高热等多重因素，扩招的宽松效应不足以抵消考生规模扩大和学校热度带来的竞争加剧，结合考生规模激增和学校热度优势做小幅修正，预测2026年最低录取位次约401名，区间355–447名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（吴健雄班）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、人工智能、软件工程、网络空间安全）
- 电子信息类（信息工程、电子科学与技术、海洋信息工程）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（智能制造与智能系统）
- 工科试验班（智慧能源与电气工程）
- 集成电路设计与集成系统
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 建筑类（建筑学、城乡规划、风景园林）
- 临床医学（5+3一体化培养）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约401名，区间355–447名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档专业（智能制造、智慧能源、集成电路）为主攻方向，一档专业（吴健雄班、计算机类、电子信息类）作为冲 刺目标，三档专业（建筑类、临床医学）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间上限（<355名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Southeast University in Hainan Province's comprehensive category were approximately 986 → 671 → 569 → 440 → 397, showing a continuous upward trend (ranking numbers decreasing year by year), with a cumulative advancement of about 589 places over the past 5 years, an average annual advancement of about 147 places; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 397, the highest historical level; the university's enrollment plan for the comprehensive category in Hainan Province: 36 students each year from 2021 to 2023, increased to 38 students from 2024 to 2025, and further expanded to 41 students in 2026, an increase of 3 students compared to 2025, an expansion rate of about 7.9%, which helps reduce competition intensity.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southeast University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 15th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (Top 20), with stable rankings in the 13–17 range in recent years, indicating a very high university level, maintaining strong appeal to high-scoring students; overall reputation has been stable in recent years, although there was negative public opinion related to teacher ethics in 2023, but with limited impact; Douyin popularity total ranking 31st (relatively popular), short video exposure is moderately high, with no obvious abnormal signals in application popularity; no discontinuation events related to Southeast University have appeared in the abnormal admission records; it has 18 disciplines rated A- or above, including Architecture, Civil Engineering, Transportation Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, and Electronic Science and Technology rated A+; Computer Science and Technology, Information and Communication Engineering, Control Science and Engineering, etc., rated A/A-, with strong disciplinary strength, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication and other core enrollment majors of Southeast University continue to be highly recommended in the 2026 major popularity analysis; the total number of Hainan Province 2026 college entrance examination candidates is about 78,000, an increase of about 10,592 people (+15.7%) compared to 67,408 in 2025, significantly expanding the competition base; Southeast University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, not a local university in Hainan, with no local protective enrollment bias; its enrollment proportion in Hainan is about 0.7%–0.8%, a relatively low level among all provinces in the country, with regional preference having a neutral impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the expansion of 3 students in 2026 (loosening effect of about +19 ranking places), the significant increase in the total number of Hainan candidates by about 15.7% (tightening effect), the sustained appeal of the university's high level, and the high popularity of core majors, the loosening effect of the expansion is insufficient to offset the intensified competition caused by the increase in candidate numbers and the university's popularity. With minor adjustments based on the surge in candidate numbers and the university's popularity advantage, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 401, with a range of 355–447.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Wu Jianxiong Class)
- Computer Class (Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Software Engineering, Cyberspace Security)
- Electronic Information Class (Information Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Marine Information Engineering)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Manufacturing and Intelligent Systems)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Energy and Electrical Engineering)
- Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Architecture Class (Architecture, Urban and Rural Planning, Landscape Architecture)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Training)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 401, range 355–447. If the ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Intelligent Manufacturing, Smart Energy, Integrated Circuits) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Wu Jianxiong Class, Computer Class, Electronic Information Class) as sprint targets, and Tier 3 majors (Architecture Class, Clinical Medicine) as safe backups. If the ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<355), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.
